name: baseline
description: Local-first coding-agent health checks and drift monitoring for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Check coding-agent health and drift locally.
interface.longDescription: Baseline runs local-first coding-agent health checks, writes reports on your machine, and compares later runs against an operator-approved Good Baseline. Raw prompts and responses stay local unless you explicitly enable redacted sync.
defaultPrompt: Set up a Baseline health check.
Run Baseline and show the report.
